review_reason: Mathematical obstruction identified: The density_escapes_source_class lemma CANNOT be proven from current construction. Lindenbaum extension is non-constructive and provides no guarantee that intermediates escape source equivalence class. Options: (a) accept termination axiom, (b) find alternative proof strategy, (c) modify construction to track formula consumption.

partial_progress.details: Phase 1 blocked: density_escapes_source_class cannot be proven. Mathematical analysis shows Lindenbaum extension is non-constructive - intermediate may remain equivalent to source.

completion_data.completion_summary: Investigated density_escapes_source_class lemma (research-007 primary recommendation). Found mathematical obstruction: Lindenbaum extension is non-constructive, providing no control over G-formulas in intermediate MCS. The intermediate may have GContent(c) subset source, making c ~ source. This confirms the fundamental termination gap.
